Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 0 0}In the wake of your recent expedition, I bear news which may be of interest to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems that at this moment, your bonds will have a uniquely beneficial effect on the creation of new Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you wish to take advantage of this opportunity, please visit the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}
